description: Your task is to manage digital assets in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) using DBeaver. Create a table named 'employee_badges' with columns BadgeId (Integer, Primary Key, Auto Increment), EmployeeId (Integer, Foreign Key referencing employees), BadgeData (BLOB), and IssueDate (Text). For the General Manager 'Andrew Adams' (EmployeeId=1), insert a record with the IssueDate '2024-01-01' and the image file '/usr/share/dbeaver-ce/dbeaver.png' stored in the BadgeData column. Export the image from the database to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/verified_badge.png' and save the SQL CREATE TABLE statement to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/badge_schema.sql'.
